F-01.evidence: Sampled 5 evidence references via Read: useGridState.ts L65-96 (hook impl), types.ts L518-554 (GridState interface), index.ts L3+L13 (exports), package.json L5 (MIT), package.json L28-32 (peerDeps). All match. External monorepo path verified via Glob (per ADR-MOD-GRID-00-001).

F-02.evidence: categoryScores recomputed: A=100 (YES2/(YES2+NO0)=100), B=100 (vacuous: 5 N/A — hook does not implement sort/filter/pagination/virtualization/edit, all delegated to Grid per spec D7/D9), C=100 (YES1/(YES1+NO0)=100), D=100 (vacuous: 2 N/A — affectedUsageFiles=0 spec Section 8.1), E=100 (YES2/(YES2+NO0)=100). Goal title contains no build/tsup/tsc/vite/rollup/size-limit/bundle keyword — A vacuous would be allowed, but A-02/A-03 actually evaluated YES so no vacuous applied. Total checks A3+B5+C3+D2+E3=16 matches rubric.

A-01.evidence: FE-only grid work (monorepo packages/grid-core). tvcom_back gradlew unrelated.

A-02.evidence: corepack pnpm --filter @tomis/grid-core exec tsc --noEmit → exit 0, 0 errors (PowerShell run 2026-05-14)

A-03.evidence: tsup build success: dist/index.mjs 29.37KB, dist/index.cjs 30.12KB (203ms). size-limit: @tomis/grid-core 24.64KB / 30KB (within limit, +0.12KB vs spec D8 baseline 24.52KB)

B-01.evidence: useGridState is state hook only — sort wiring delegated to TanStack useReactTable consumer (spec D7 AC-003 Option A). Sort behavior verification belongs to G-002 controlled mode.

B-02.evidence: Filter behavior — same delegation pattern (D7). Hook returns columnFilters state + setter only; Grid wiring is G-002 scope.

B-03.evidence: Pagination behavior — same delegation pattern. Hook returns pagination state + setter only.

B-04.evidence: Virtualization unrelated to state hook. C-18 compatibility maintained (no CSS, no DOM rendering assumptions in hook).

B-05.evidence: Inline editing not in scope. Hook is generic state container (8 standard TanStack states).

C-01.evidence: affectedUsageFiles=[] (spec Section 8.1). Zero migrated usage files. Confirmed via grep '@tomis/grid-core' + 'useGridState' in tw-framework-front: 4 matches but all reference local hook 'tw-framework-front/src/hooks/tomis/useGridState.ts' (different signature, pre-existing), not new package export.

C-02.evidence: Hook has no UI surface. affectedUsageFiles=0 — no visual regression possible.

C-03.evidence: Grep 'console.(warn|error)' in useGridState.ts: 0 matches. tsc 0 errors (no React deprecation warning). No runtime side-effects in hook (8x useState only).

D-01.evidence: affectedUsageFiles=0 — migration ratio undefined. New baseline hook for future variant migrations (G-002+).

D-02.evidence: Zero remaining usage files (none existed). 8 variants (BaseGrid/VirtualGrid/...) listed in spec Section 3 are migration targets for future Goals (G-002 controlled mode + per-variant Goals), not within G-001 scope.

E-01.evidence: size-limit @tomis/grid-core: 24.64KB / 30KB. Δ = +0.12KB vs spec D8 baseline 24.52KB (G-005 measurement). Well within 30KB grid-core limit (C-21). ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 measure-at-implement-time policy honored.

E-02.evidence: No new dependency added. useGridState uses existing peers only: react (useState), @tanstack/react-table (8 type imports). package.json L28-32 unchanged.

E-03.evidence: package.json L5: "license": "MIT" preserved. grid-core is open-source MIT (not Pro), so EULA + license verification macro N/A. C-24 compliant.

feedback.summary: G-001 useGridState 훅 구현은 spec authority(C-27) 완전 일치. 신규 hook이라 호환성/마이그레이션 축은 vacuous(N/A) 처리, 빌드+번들+라이선스 축은 모두 YES.
feedback.wrapperPreservation: Grid.tsx + internal/8files + legacy/7files all untouched (verified via mtime: 1:56 KST or earlier, vs G-001 changes at 4:17-4:20 KST 2026-05-14). Zero MOD-GRID-01 regression.
highlights: 8 useState 정확 초기값 (D4 spec table 일치): sorting=[], columnFilters=[], rowSelection={}, pagination={pageIndex:0,pageSize:10}, columnPinning={}, columnOrder=[], columnSizing={}, columnVisibility={}
8 setter OnChangeFn<T> 명시 (C-4 strict + C-2 TanStack standard) — type assertion 'as OnChangeFn<StateType>' L87-94는 React Dispatch<SetStateAction<T>> → TanStack OnChangeFn<T> 정당한 변환
package.json peerDependencies L28-32: react/react-dom/@tanstack/react-table/@tanstack/react-virtual 모두 peer (C-22 정책)
